userPage.title: My Submissions
userPage.description: Stations and cells you have submitted for verification

detail.title: Submission Review
detail.readOnly: This submission has been reviewed and can no longer be edited.
detail.reviewNotesPlaceholder: Add a note for the submitter (optional)...
detail.staleWarning: This submission was modified since you opened it. Please review the updated version before proceeding.

rejectApproveCard.confirmReject: Are you sure you want to reject this submission?
rejectApproveCard.confirmRejectDesc: This can't be undone. The station won't be added to the database.
rejectApproveCard.confirmApprove: Are you sure you want to approve this submission?
rejectApproveCard.confirmApproveDesc: This can't be undone. The station will be added to the database and the submission marked as approved.

deletionBanner: This submission requests deletion of station {{stationId}}. If approved, the station will be marked as inactive.

submissionSelector.title: Select Station
submissionSelector.newStationHint: Start by placing the station on the map below.

ratSelector.title: Radio Technologies
ratSelector.description: Select radio technologies (RAT) available at this station
ratSelector.noSelection: Select at least one technology to add cells.
ratSelector.iotHint: IoT cells can be marked in LTE and NR tables as IoT (NB-IoT/LTE-M) and RedCap respectively

deleteStation.title: Delete Station
deleteStation.warning: This station will be flagged for deletion and reviewed by a moderator.
deleteStation.reasonPlaceholder: Why should this station be deleted?

validation.stationIdTooShort: Station ID must be at least 2 characters
validation.typeInvalid: Type must be NSA or SA
validation.cidDuplicate: CID must be unique within the same RAT
validation.enbidClidDuplicate: eNBID+CLID combination must be unique within LTE cells
validation.arfcnBandMismatch: ARFCN does not match the selected band

form.noChanges: No changes detected - edit a field or add a note to enable the update button.

table.searchPlaceholder: Search by station ID or submission ID...
table.emptyHintUser: You haven't submitted any stations yet. Start by creating a new submission

stationComments.title: Comments
stationComments.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this comment?

toast.photoUploadFailed: Submission created, but photo upload failed

warnings.photosDesc: If you plan to add these photos to multiple stations at this location, wait for the first submission to be approved - once accepted, you can select those photos for other stations without re-uploading them.

photos.label: Photos
photos.confirmDeleteDesc: This can't be undone. The photo will be permanently deleted.
photos.emptyLocation: No photos at this location yet.

mySubmissions.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this submission?
mySubmissions.confirmDeleteDesc: This can't be undone. The submission will be permanently deleted.

unsavedChangesConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
